description_long: This is a thick, rectangular book with a visually striking cover in shades of purple and blue, accented by a large, central pink diamond shape. The cover features reinforced corners and edges with angular, geometric embellishments, giving it a sturdy and somewhat fantastical appearance. The book's pages are visible along the sides, appearing off-white and slightly uneven, suggesting a substantial volume. The cover design is symmetrical, with the geometric motifs repeated on both the front and back. The spine is broad and solid, matching the cover's color scheme and style, but lacks any visible text or ornamentation. The overall look is bold and stylized, reminiscent of a magical tome or a special edition volume.
description: A thick, purple and blue book with a large pink diamond on the cover and reinforced geometric corners, giving it a magical or fantasy appearance.
description_view_0: The book is seen from the short edge, showing the layered pages and the reinforced blue corners framing the purple cover with the pink diamond.
description_view_1: A wide view of the book's long edge, highlighting the thick spine, the geometric blue embellishments, and the full expanse of the purple cover with the central pink diamond.
description_view_2: The opposite short edge is visible, again showing the layered pages and the symmetrical blue corner reinforcements around the purple cover.
description_view_3: The back cover is shown, featuring the same purple and blue color scheme and geometric design, but without the central pink diamond.
attribute_cover_illustration: The front cover features a large, stylized pink diamond shape set against a purple background, framed by angular blue geometric embellishments at the corners and edges. The design is bold and abstract, with no figurative imagery or detailed illustration.
attribute_spine_design: The spine is broad and matches the purple and blue color scheme of the cover, with geometric blue accents but no visible text or decorative patterns.
